applied_optimizations.name: Triton LayerNorm kernel with 2-pass algorithm
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented custom Triton kernel for LayerNorm with 2-pass algorithm (mean/var in pass 1, normalize+affine in pass 2). Uses BLOCK_SIZE=8192 (capped next_power_of_2), wavefront-aligned for AMD MI355X. Achieves 2.82x speedup over PyTorch nn.LayerNorm.

top_bottlenecks: Triton kernel is already 2.82x faster than baseline

notes: Initial Triton implementation achieves 2.82x speedup (1.46ms vs 4.12ms baseline)
Input shape: (16, 64, 256, 256), N=4194304 elements per row
2-pass algorithm: pass 1 computes sum and sum_sq for mean/var, pass 2 normalizes and applies affine transform
BLOCK_SIZE capped at 8192 to avoid register pressure
Verified results are stable across multiple benchmark runs

global_notes: LayerNorm Triton kernel on AMD MI355X achieves significant speedup over PyTorch baseline
Key optimizations: 2-pass algorithm, BLOCK_SIZE=8192, explicit float32 casting
